location.consentMessage:
Seoul, With You recommends personalized weather and date spots based on your current location!
(This service is currently limited to Seoul.)
location.seoulOnlyToast: This service is only available in Seoul. Please select a different area.

weather.loadError: Couldn't load weather info. Please check your network and server (EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL) connection.

map.currentLocationDescription: Shows your current location on the map.
map.noMarkers: No markers match the selected filter.
map.viewSelectedRestaurantOnMaps: View selected restaurant on Google Maps
map.webPreviewUnavailable: Native maps aren't available in the web preview
map.webPreviewHint: Run this on an iOS simulator, Android emulator, or the Expo Go app to see the map.
map.openCurrentAreaInBrowser: Open the current area in Google Maps in your browser
